summary: My Space Phase 3 Testing Complete - All features verified. Auto-download toggle button visible in header with localStorage persistence ('vs_auto_download'). CompletionPromptModal component has correct structure with all required test IDs. Deduplication via promptedJobIds ref prevents duplicate prompts. All Phase 1 & 2 features still working (3 sections, Watch/Download/WhatsApp buttons, Retry buttons).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user data (50 jobs: 10 in-progress, 45 completed, 5 failed)

Deduplication via promptedJobIds.current.has() prevents duplicate prompts.
